creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
Another distfile, another diff.

diff -ruN /usr/ports/www/drood/Makefile ./drood/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/www/drood/Makefile	Sat Jul 14 13:13:10 2007
+++ ./drood/Makefile	Fri Jul 20 12:05:41 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	drood
-PORTVERSION=	1.10
+PORTVERSION=	1.11
  CATEGORIES=	www
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/

diff -ruN /usr/ports/www/drood/distinfo ./drood/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/www/drood/distinfo	Sat Jul 14 13:13:10 2007
+++ ./drood/distinfo	Fri Jul 20 12:47:56 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (drood-1.10.tar.gz) = 79eb28337e2960fbcd76c98253c666b4
-SHA256 (drood-1.10.tar.gz) = 
671320a3a4870c55c4501386f26bce00461d0920d4a3606e8a4479892adefe80
-SIZE (drood-1.10.tar.gz) = 20586
+MD5 (drood-1.11.tar.gz) = 902cfeb38a0772e8ff2e41a254529c7f
+SHA256 (drood-1.11.tar.gz) = 
85480f8c007e64f45f1af803e65876b6f874b09649fc637572c033a3c409b895
+SIZE (drood-1.11.tar.gz) = 20632
